summary: Sharpens AI onboarding, adds cache inventory and per-series cleanup, and ships smaller stripped release binaries.
highlights: Expanded onboarding guidance for LLMs around batching, cache discipline, and destructive local-state changes
New `reserve cache inventory` view for local series coverage, gaps, and metadata readiness
New `reserve cache clear --series <ID>` command for targeted observation-set cleanup
Canonical cache selection and warnings when multiple cached observation sets exist
Release artifacts now use stripped production builds for smaller downloads
update_instructions: Download the latest release from the GitHub releases page or rerun the install script from download.reservecli.dev.
